---
title: receiver-naming
description: "Enforce consistent receiver names."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Enforce consistent receiver names. Strider default: no maximum length.

## Bad

```go
func (self *Client) Send() error
```

## Good

```go
func (c *Client) Send() error
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only receiver-naming`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
